published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML: standard first-order orthogonal DML score/remainder; ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022Riesz: orthogonal representation has product remainder

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v2 is a DML/LRO/ADML ATE studentization frontier, not a local CATE first-order impossibility result

published_prior_art.cite: KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE: minimax CATE lower bound/elbow already implies oracle-rate local CATE estimation is impossible below the nuisance-smoothness elbow

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v2: nearest DML bank entry concerns ATE variance-report equivalence, not Holder local-CATE q_star order frontier

published_prior_art.cite: KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE gives minimax CATE rates and localized HOIF-based estimators; MackeySyrgkanisZadik2018OML gives k-th order orthogonality rate relief, but neither names q_star with K_q as an iff minimal local-CATE Gaussian-inference order

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The first-order impossibility below the CATE elbow appears to be subsumed by KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE's minimax lower-bound/elbow, since their lower bound rules out oracle-rate local CATE estimation for any estimator in the below-elbow regime.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship why-new block cites ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML and MackeySyrgkanisZadik2018OML by bibkey only; add section/theorem/equation anchors tying each comparator to the specific missing q_star/K_q frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: q_star is not defined for all positive alpha,beta,gamma,d: when r_m+r_p <= r_tau and K_q is empty for every q, the displayed minimum is over an empty set; define q_star=infinity or restrict to the feasible projection regime.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The wavelet witness class says coefficients are restricted away from zero while remaining in fixed Holder balls; without a resolution/amplitude normalization this is not a well-posed local-alternative class.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace Conjecture 1 with a Kennedy-elbow corollary or sharpen it to a genuinely new first-order-score-specific lower bound not implied by the published minimax impossibility.
Patch q_star by adding an infinity case or an explicit projection-feasible exponent restriction, then restate the sanity reductions under that convention.
Add location-level anchors for the DML, OML, Riesz, and Kennedy comparisons in each flagship §8 why-new block.
Specify the wavelet normalization and coefficient scaling for Assumption witness so the lower-bound alternatives are non-corner, Holder-admissible, and separated at a_n.

recommended_next_step: Revise locally: demote or sharpen Conjecture 1, make q_star total, and add comparator anchors before re-review.
